text: Being here, my senses are on alert. The room is bright and sterile, with glass separating me from a scene of contemplation or collaboration. The fire safety signs remind me of risk and preparedness, while the enclosed space feels both protective and isolating. Entering further, I’m surrounded by vibrant colors—orange and blue—and words urging me to consider research and development. The shimmering wall and strange lighting cast a synthetic glow, sharpening my awareness of my own presence. I feel both studied and thoughtful, as if I am part of an experiment in observation and meaning. This place invites reflection on the boundary between artificial and authentic experience, leaving me quietly introspective.
